SEARCH
Package grafiosch.exportdelete

Class AdditionalExportQuery

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.exportdelete.AdditionalExportQuery
public class AdditionalExportQuery extends Object
Describes a ready-to-run SELECT whose result rows are appended to the personal-data export (gt_data.sql) as additional INSERT statements.

This is the bridge that lets application-specific IExportMyDataAddon implementations contribute extra rows which cannot be expressed through the static ExportDefinition mechanism — for example, rows whose selection depends on a runtime decision (a registry lookup, a feature flag) rather than on a fixed SQL predicate.

The selectSql must be a complete statement starting with SELECT ... FROM ... with all identifiers inlined and no bind parameters (? placeholders). It is executed verbatim and its rows are turned into INSERT INTO <tableName> ... statements, so its projection must match the target table's columns (typically <alias>.*).

  • Constructor Details

    • AdditionalExportQuery

      public AdditionalExportQuery(String tableName, String selectSql)
      Creates an additional export query.
      Parameters:
      tableName - the target table the selected rows belong to; used as the INSERT INTO target
      selectSql - the complete SELECT ... FROM ... statement (no bind parameters) producing rows whose columns match tableName
